title: U.S.-Iran deal lifts equities, sends oil lower, while crypto stays wary
summary: The peace deal reached over the weekend provided the stimulus many markets had been waiting for. Crypto traders, however, have learned to distrust this particular headline

title: Middle East ceasefire, Fed interest-rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 15.

title: Trump-linked stablecoin used for bonus payouts at White House UFC contest
summary: UFC Freedom 250 paid fighter bonuses in USD1, the stablecoin issued by the Trump-linked crypto venture World Liberty Financial, at a contest held at the White House.

title: Ark Invest bought more than $500 million worth of SpaceX shares on IPO day
summary: The purchases were likely funded by selling other positions, data shows. ARK is also one of the loudest bitcoin bulls, with a million-dollar target for 2030.

title: Bitcoin traders have a reason to watch Tuesday's BOJ rate decision. Yen shorts are at a nine-year high
summary: A large build-up of speculative short positions in the yen raises the risk of a sharp short squeeze if the BOJ signals more aggressive tightening, potentially unwinding yen-funded carry trades that support risk assets.
